summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ZVG-Portal Termin-Extraktor updates including improved contrast, PDF links, all 16 German states, and extended filtering functionality
passed_tests: All 16 German states available in filter dropdown and settings
Price range filter with predefined ranges (Усі ціни, до 50.000 €, 50.000-100.000 €, etc.)
Search filter works across case number, court, city fields
Clear filters button resets all filters correctly
Detail panel has improved contrast - Verkehrswert in blue highlighted block with white text
Document links show PDF icons and download indicators
Backend API filtering: /api/foreclosures?price_min=100000&price_max=300000 returns filtered results
Backend API search: /api/foreclosures?search=Stuttgart returns filtered results
Settings dialog shows all 16 states with checkboxes
All backend API endpoints working (25/25 tests passed)
Extended object details in accordion format
